meta.title: Distance to the Mass Gap
meta.subtitle: Live verification dashboard for THE ERIKSSON PROGRAMME
meta.checkpoint: latest recorded lake build YangMillsCore - 8398 jobs green; source checkpoint f4fe7f1d
meta.axioms: [propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound] - no sorry, no project axioms
meta.frontier: hRpoly - concrete Yang-Mills activity decay for the actual gauge RG operator

status_legend.proved: Machine-checked theorem reachable from YangMillsCore; oracle-clean on Lean's three standard axioms.
status_legend.partial: Substantial verified infrastructure exists, but the headline statement is conditional or still awaits a named source theorem.
status_legend.open: Open work: either known mathematics still missing from the formal library, or genuinely open continuum mathematics.

class_legend.A: Known published mathematics or verified finite formalization work
class_legend.B: Standard mathematics missing from Mathlib or local infrastructure
class_legend.D: Repository plumbing and public audit infrastructure

milestones.label: Representation / character layer
milestones.note: Strong Schur and character infrastructure; compact Peter-Weyl completeness remains open.

milestones.label: U(1) / toy non-vacuous gap route
milestones.note: Useful exact Fourier and selection-rule foundations; not the live frontier.

milestones.label: SU(N) unconditional lattice mass gap
milestones.note: IR side and assembly are theorem-fed; Catalan/Schur budgets, KP activity-domain control, and the unitary diamagnetic bridge advanced; the concrete UV activity producer remains open.

milestones.label: Full Clay statement
milestones.note: Continuum construction plus OS/Wightman reconstruction and spectral gap.

groups.label: Lattice polymer gas, area laws, IR clustering

nodes.label: Centre vanishing integral
nodes.note: Base centre-symmetry fact on SU(N) Haar, packaged through the general left-invariant vanishing engine.

nodes.label: Full N-ality selection rules
nodes.note: Trace powers, mixed moments, entry selection rules, and power sums all route through the centre-vanishing engine.

nodes.label: Sharp second moment
nodes.note: The loose trace-norm bound is sharpened to the exact Haar second moment.

nodes.label: U(1) character orthogonality
nodes.note: Exact AddCircle Fourier orthogonality; useful as a non-vacuous abelian sanity route.

nodes.label: Matrix-coefficient L2 API
nodes.note: Generic continuous-unitary matrix API and fundamental SU(N) orthogonality are done; completeness is still F3.

nodes.label: Peter-Weyl completeness
nodes.note: Known mathematics, not yet supplied by Mathlib; routes around it exist for the lattice polymer path.

nodes.label: Generic Schur orthogonality
nodes.note: Haar-averaged intertwiner construction with exact coefficient normalization; does not prove completeness.

nodes.label: Character expansion
nodes.note: Classical Fourier-Weyl expansion of the Boltzmann weight; the proved lattice polymer route avoids relying on it.

nodes.label: Mayer / Ursell layer
nodes.note: Partition identities, recurrence, complete-graph coefficients, and the n=1 Mayer identity.

nodes.label: Penrose tree-graph inequality
nodes.note: Greedy BFS partition scheme with Boolean-interval fibers.

nodes.label: Tree counting
nodes.note: Rooted child-count bound in the order needed by KP.

nodes.label: Per-tree activity walk bound
nodes.note: Leaf-removal induction over shrinking vertex types.

nodes.label: KP per-size bound
nodes.note: Absolute convergence and cluster-sum norm bound under the KP criterion.

nodes.label: Sharp Kotecky-Preiss
nodes.note: Sharp pinned convergence with the volume caveat removed.

nodes.label: Catalan majorant / Schur budget closure
nodes.note: The July 2026 Catalan lane proves exact rooted Catalan closure, finite partial majorants, the scaled closed square-root bound, and the bridge into Schur-Catalan RG budgets and physical precision covariance consumers.

nodes.label: KP activity domains / zero-free polydisc
nodes.note: The KP criterion is monotone under pointwise activity domination, so one KP weight certifies a closed zero-free activity polydisc; the fugacity section is an explicit polynomial.

nodes.label: High-temperature Mayer expansion
nodes.note: Termwise finite expansion of the Wilson Boltzmann factor with explicit integrability and KP seed.

nodes.label: Disjoint-support factorization
nodes.note: Product-measure factorization for observables reading disjoint coordinate sets.

nodes.label: Lattice polymer system satisfies KP
nodes.note: Physical plaquette gas with gauge-expectation activities and small-coupling KP criterion.

nodes.label: Lattice-animal entropy
nodes.note: Volume-free connected-polymer counting through a point.

nodes.label: Volume-uniform Mayer convergence
nodes.note: Mayer-series convergence with all hypotheses depending only on dimension and smallness data.

nodes.label: Centre selection rule at any beta
nodes.note: Interacting Gibbs measure is centre-invariant; SU(n) Wilson loops with nontrivial N-ality vanish at any beta.

nodes.label: Wilson-loop area laws
nodes.note: Finite-volume and volume-uniform, linearized and exact-activity area-law variants.

nodes.label: IR exponential clustering
nodes.note: Theorem-fed lattice Gibbs exponential clustering; the IR input to the mass-gap assembly is no longer carried.

nodes.label: RG averaging / kernel substrate
nodes.note: A theorem-fed averaging, Gaussian, kernel, marginal-coupling, covariance, and animal-count substrate for the gauge RG.

nodes.label: Appendix-F / H# adapters
nodes.note: Approximately 98% as a consumer/adapter layer: source-facing wrappers, certified-tail profiles, canonical-root residual routes, H# consumers, and newly oracle-covered Appendix-F hole target geometry/family targets exist; source estimates remain open.

nodes.label: Physical-operator vertical slice
nodes.note: Approximately 94% as infrastructure: physical cochains, covariance/root APIs, Wilson-Hessian/Green dictionaries, Gaussian pushforward routes, Catalan-controlled precision covariance consumers, physical precision residual coverage, and activity consumers are in Lean.

nodes.label: CMP116 / Balaban source packages
nodes.note: Lemma-3, Eq. (2.29), Eq. (2.31), Eq. (2.37), post-P, B/local, and source-db routes are sharply packaged, but the analytic source theorems are not proved.

nodes.label: Flow-diamagnetic UV branch
nodes.note: The route now includes marginal recursion, killed walks, factorial-kernel bounds, and a finite-dimensional bridge from complex unitary matrices to Euclidean linear isometries. It is producer-side scaffolding toward hRpoly, not a proof of hRpoly.

nodes.label: hRpoly - concrete YM activity decay
nodes.note: The live frontier. About 76% of surrounding scaffolding is source-audited or theorem-fed, including Catalan/Schur precision budgets, KP activity domains, and the unitary diamagnetic bridge, but the real Balaban/Dimock Yang-Mills activity-decay estimate is still open.

nodes.label: UV suppression producer
nodes.note: Single-scale UV bound consumed by the mass-gap assembly. It becomes theorem-fed once hRpoly closes.

nodes.label: M3 assembly theorem
nodes.note: Conditional lattice mass-gap assembly: IR clustering plus a UV suppression hypothesis imply a uniform positive gap.

nodes.label: M3 - unconditional lattice mass gap
nodes.note: Approximately 94% in architecture: close hRpoly and the strong-coupling lattice mass gap closes. This still does not move the Clay boundary.

nodes.label: Leak A - non-degenerate observable
nodes.note: The witness measure and observable must be forced to be genuine, nonconstant, and non-vacuous.

nodes.label: Leak B - honest continuum scaling
nodes.note: The lattice spacing must be tied to the RG trajectory; otherwise the mass scale is a coordinate artifact.

nodes.label: M4 - continuum limit
nodes.note: Continuum limit of 4D non-abelian lattice Yang-Mills: no published proof exists.

nodes.label: M5 - OS/Wightman reconstruction
nodes.note: OS axioms, Wightman reconstruction, and the continuum spectral gap remain open mathematics.

nodes.label: Clay Yang-Mills mass gap
nodes.note: Full continuum construction plus mass gap. Honest distance: ~0% (<0.1%).
